name: harden-implementation-tracking
description: Harden implementation tracking so removed files become a first-class persisted review state, refresh can resurrect them safely, and manual tracking commands enforce tracked-only existence rules in core. The change also aligns manifest and repository contracts, resets artifact state after writes, and makes CLI review stricter by preserving tracked-link ignores and requiring kind-aware stale-symbol fallback.
